text:
Simone Biles in action on the balance beam during the 2013 P&G Gymnastics Championships in Hartford, Connecticut

Simone Biles hugs her mother Nellie Biles at Bannon’s Gymnastix in Houston

Simone Biles competes in the women’s balance beam final in the Artistic Gymnastics World Championships in Belgium

Simone Biles on the balance beam during the 45th Artistic Gymnastics World Championships in Nanning, China

Gabby Douglas and Simone Biles pose for a portrait in 2015 in Los Angeles

Simone Biles is surrounded by media during a grand opening event for the World Champions Centre in Spring, Texas. The facility is owned by her parents Ron and Nellie Biles

Simone Biles, celebrates with Lauren Hernandez, MyKayla Skinner, Ragan Smith, Ashton Locklear, Alexandra Raisman, Madison Kocian, and Gabrielle Douglas after they were selected for the 2016 Olympic Gymnastics Team following on July 10, 2016 in San Jose, California

Simone Biles competes in the qualifying round of the women’s balance beam event during the 2016 Olympic Games in Rio de Janeiro

Simone Biles, Lauren Hernandez, Alexandra Raisman, Gabrielle Douglas, and Madison Kocian of the United States celebrate winning the Gold Medal at the 2016 Olympic Games in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil

Simone Biles of the United States poses with her Gold Medal in Rio

Simone Biles during the women’s individual all-around of the 2016 Olympics

Simone Biles vaultiing during the FIG Artistic Gymnastics World Championships at  in Stuttgart, Germany

Yul Moldauer, Simone Biles and MyKayla Skinner at the 2020 Olympic Games in Tokyo, Japan

President Joe Biden awards Simone Biles the Presidential Medal of Freedom, the nation’s highest civilian honor, at the White House

Simone Biles kisses husband Jonathan Owens of the Green Bay Packers before a game against the Kansas City Chiefs at Lambeau Field in Green Bay, Wisconsin

Simone Biles practices on the balance beam during a gymnastics training session ahead of the 2024 Olympic Games in Paris

Simone Biles on the balance beam during the women’s team final during the 2024 Olympic Games in Paris

Simone Biles, Jade Carey, Jordan Chiles, Sunisa Lee, and Hezly Rivera celebrate  their Gold Medal win on the podium on July 30, 2024
title: Simone Biles: 2024 Olympic Champion
author: Griffin Lotz
description: Photos of Simone Biles, Gold-Medal winning American gymnast, during competition over the years
